author: Andrea L.
pros: Their portal is intuitive but a part from that it has been a waste of money
cons: I have been more than 4 months with the software not working and support just never gets back to my email. I lost clients for this reason but they don't care. Probably because I bought a lifetime deal and I am not a "convenient" customer for them anymore but then why offer life time deals if you are not going to deliver? Also they don't understand that I could be a further source of income if they make their product work and give me some support.Would definitely look for alternatives if you're looking for an efficient customer support

description: Excellent. Brosw.ai was easy to get started and configure for my needs, and quick to get the results I wanted, saving a lot of time. Good customer support too.
author: Daniel L.
pros: With briwse.ai, simple tasks are a breeze, but it can handle complexity when you require it. When I didn't find a pre-built robot for the service I needed, I was surprised how easy it was to build my own - and it worked, first time!
cons: I'm looking forward to throwing a wider range of tasks at Browse.ai but so far, no complaints at all.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The future of cutting edge Ai technology
description: Overall, this app has massive potential for my own startup business and for anyone who wants to get involved with essential ai tools that can perform automated tasks. You can customize a bot to perform multiple and retrieve information in 5 minutes! On top of that, the customer service was by far the best I've seen from any AI company, let alone most companies in general. There was a real person answering my question and offering me solutions and they actually went out of their way to make sure that i had every concern or question answered and even gave me enthusiastic feedback (and more) on a business plan i want to execute. Cuttting edge technology that I can see life changing potential for myself. It's a tool that is basically an all encompassing task force that the user can learn to create custom for themself or their business with the ability to integrate with other tools and platforms to get the job done the way you want it done.
author: Drake P.
pros: In complete honesty this is my favorite AI tool hands down, because it offers a simple way to design your own task action bot to help you get data on information that is useful for any business owner. It also allows me to choose between several code languages or customize the bot without code, offering a practical solution for everyone. It is going to help my business tremendously for the reasons mixed with the abilityto program the bot to integrate seemlessly with some of the most valuable, time saving, integration apps like zapier to automate a work flow and perform the tasks on autopilot while also retrieving the data essential for my business's product research and competing data analalysis. I will certainly be investing more and more time into this platform....they also offer a full service creation/management for users who can afford to have it created for them while also creating video modules that show a simple process to get started customizing your own. 11/10!!
cons: to be honest, the only thing I personally didn't like about the app was my lack of understanding anything related to code, which makes it difficult for me personally to customize the robot at an expert level, however, that has nothing to do with the app but more my lack of prior knowledge.
author_profession: Ecommerce retail, content creation, affiliate marketing, airbnb management when my parent's secure property in hawaii
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The tool provided me with exactly what I'm looking for, an easy and intuitive way to scrape information online. On its own, Browse AI is amazing. What really elevates it for me is the customer support. Kimber helped me out with a few questions I had, and she is an absolute joy to work with. She's incredibly helpful and prompt, and her genuine care for the end user is remarkable. I highly recommend Browse AI. And thank you Kimber for the amazing support!
cons: So far, there doesn't seem to be any. It does exactly what it set out to do. The pricing is reasonable and the customer support is great.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fundamental tool for market research, outstanding support
author: Felix B.
pros: BrowseAI is a fundamental no-code tool in my market research workflows, allowing me to obtain data that otherwise would require coding skills. Whenever I've encountered any issues, their Customer Support has provided solutions (even some customised features).

author: David L.
pros: It makes automating data scraping and exporting to Google Sheets simple and efficient. The intuitive UI and helpful support guides make getting started easy, and the ability to monitor new listings automatically is a huge time-saver.
cons: The UI is intuitive but occasionally buggy. Sometimes things don’t load smoothly, but since it's a newer company, I expect they'll improve it over time.

review_title: Most intuitive no-code webscraper out there
description: I've learned Browse.AI and used it for no-code projects I never would have been able to do before. It's easy to learn, powerful, and fast.
author: Michael H.
pros: Browse.AI is very intuitive for folks who can't code. And while it's easy to get started, features like "deep-scraping" and integrations with popular tools like Airtable make this quite powerful.
cons: No drawbacks. This is exactly what I was looking for.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Its great bit of software. Saves me lots of time.
author: Tim S.
pros: The user interface is easy to use and the software is updated reguarly with new features.
cons: Although this is probably due to the websites we are grabbing information from, some of the list view captures are a bit clumsy and hard to capture certain information.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: La herramienta definitiva para web scraping automatizado
description: Mi experiencia general con Browse AI ha sido excelente. Como analista de datos, esta herramienta me ha ahorrado una gran cantidad de tedioso trabajo manual extractando datos. Los bots son rápidos, precisos y muy confiables. El soporte técnico también ha sido efectivo resolviendo cualquier duda.Definitivamente recomendaría Browse AI para cualquier empresa o persona que requiera extraer datos de la web de forma sencilla y automatizada. Ha optimizado enormemente mis flujos de trabajo y procesos de análisis de datos. Sin duda una solución indispensable para mi stack de herramientas de uso diario.
author: Dagoberto M.
pros: Lo que más me gusta de Browse AI es la facilidad para automatizar la extracción de datos web sin necesidad de saber programar. Con solo arrastrar y soltar puedo configurar bots para scrapear prácticamente cualquier dato. También me encanta la variedad de integraciones y conectores con otras plataformas que agilizan mi flujo de trabajo.
cons: Lo que menos me gustó es que en ocasiones la interfaz se torna un poco lenta cuando se tienen muchos bots y grandes volúmenes de datos. Aunque esto no afecta las ejecuciones automatizadas, la experiencia en la interfaz podría mejorarse.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: A wonderful experience with this browser, especially with the addition of artificial intelligence, which makes browsing easier and more advanced
author: Karis T.
pros: What I love about it is its ease of use, in addition to the artificial intelligence tools it contains

review_title: Browse AI Making Google Sheets Fun Again!
author: Rise M.
pros: Browse AI is incredibly easy to use with a large range of prebuilt robots and easy no-code settings for creating your own, this makes it one of the strongest in its respective field. It's removed a lot of pain for me when it comes to updating my Google Sheets with the most recent information.
cons: Right now for me personally, it's the pricing structure. For individuals with only a few hundred to a thousand requests per month the options are very limited. I would like to see Pay-As-Go added for those that don't require continuous updates.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Scrape simply faster with Browse AI
author: Shad A.
pros: The training Robot is designed really well. Exceptionally easy for a person who doesn't even know to code.
cons: Very Few times the bot stops midway before entire list is scraped, other than that it works just fine.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very useful since I was able to test it on three different sites and extract data in the way I needed.
author: Adriano M.
pros: The extreme ease of performing data scraping without knowing a single line of code.
cons: There is nothing that I didn't like about Browse AI; my only constructive comment would be to have more tutorials for absolute laymen like me. There are tutorials but even in them some terms are difficult for laymen to understand.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Powerful user-friendly automation for deep scraping esp. when combined with other tools/integrations
description: Good but I haven’t been able to fully test my complete process it because I ran out of credits. Took me longer than expected to get it all set up with the integrations and understand how everything works and flows together but also impressed by its strength when combined with others integrations and apps as well as by visual training tool.
author: Peter W.
pros: (1) Excellent, fast and responsive support - even for new, free accounts which is pretty unheard of. (2) User-friendly interface, build/training process, and operation - but ultimate success depends on how many down/upstream integrations you have/need with 3rd parties for your overarching process, understanding/mastery of them/Brosw.Al, and getting a handle on how some of the background data flows work as there can be some unforeseen road bumps in how everything links together that required some research and learning via trial & error (3) Browse.Al workflows for deep scraping bulks-runs combined with Monitors have great promise, just haven't had enough credits to fully test mine yet
cons: (1) Their "credits" based charging regime/formula is rather complicated. Hard to figure out how much a complete process is going to cost you. Would be nice if they had a calculator to let you preview / estimate costs to achieve your mission before executing it as well as ongoing costs based on your Monitor settings / other variables both single elements (robots and workflows) but also across your entire account (2) There are a few little "gotchas" that I ran into that I felt could be better explained upfront or more detailed in help articles. For example, using Workflows vs Bulk Runs and how to set up is a little confusing. Also, gSheets integration inserts/creates/appends new rows which took me a while to understand through trial & error which, in my case, had downstream impacts that would have been good to understand up-front. Data Formatting was also an issue for me for gSheets integration. Would have also been nice (not their fault) to have more direct Zapier integrations to avoid having to go through gSheets first as a middle step to accomplish my task, but that's not really Browse Al's responsibility.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
